subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! I read thy letter and was deeply moved by thy sorrow. Thou art remembered and under His watchful care, ever before His sight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله رقیمه خواندم و از حزنت متاثر ماندم در نظری و بی خطری و ملحوظ نظر
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
